name: generate_hw_emu_dir
short_description: Used to generate the emulation section for DSAs.
full_help:
generate_hw_emu_dir

Description: 
Used to generate the emulation section for DSAs.

Syntax: 
generate_hw_emu_dir  [-platform-name <arg>] [-emu-prop-dict <arg>]
                     [-output-dir-path <arg>] [-working-dir <arg>] [-quiet]
                     [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                Description
  -------------------------------
  [-platform-name]    Arguments
  [-emu-prop-dict]    emu properties dict file
  [-output-dir-path]  Output path where to place the emulation output
  [-working-dir]      Staging files are created in the path and deleted post 
                      completion
  [-quiet]            Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]          Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Vitis, Platform, FileIO

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
